title: FresnelDiffractionSettings
description: Settings for the Fresnel diffraction propagation task.

lambda.description:
Wavelength in meters. Must satisfy:
- lambda > 0

dx.description:
Pixel pitch in meters along X. Must satisfy:
- dx > 0
- dx = dy

dy.description:
Pixel pitch in meters along Y. Must satisfy:
- dy > 0
- dy = dx

z.description: Propagation distance in meters. Can be positive or negative.
